title: That kind of fairy-tale for example
overview: Takashi is late for school and gets distracted by his friends along the way; Shusuke and Karuo plan a party.

title: My favourite animal is the pegasus
overview: Hayato Narita is hired to help a girl find her stolen bicycle; Shusuke Chitose reviews the autobiography of an ex-porn star.

title: Kobato is really adorable
overview: Shusuke learns he is being trained by Hiyoko; YFB rumbles with R-Wing and Hayato is in the middle of the action.

title: Dora......... I think I might be pregnant at the moment......
overview: Ai and Naru compete for Hayato's attention; unusual events unfold at Alexander involving Kakeru, Shusuke, and a violent customer.

title: Oh, thee exalted virtues of Count Bork!
overview: Takashi has a difficult time coming to terms with the various conditions that come with dating Asuka.

title: Yikes! No way, they'll hear us!
overview: Chitose has a new experience as Hiyoko dresses his wound; Drac warns Otori about a dangerous man in a hat.

title: The Admirable King Has Returned!
overview: Garuda, the King of Gretagard, seizes control of Takashi's body and reunites with his old friend Phoenix.

title: Is the Big-Breasted Gal with Cream Still Not Here Yet!
overview: When Lord Hawk is pierced by a poisoned blade, Sparrow uses her body as a tool to help him expel the venom.

title: My Heart Is Pounding!
overview: Shusuke assumes control of Takashi; Hiyoko hears some heartbreaking criticism; Naru recruits some friends to help find her missing bicycle.

title: Please Be My Fan Forever
overview: Hayato handles the essay situation before he find himself caught up in an awkward situation with a couple of girls.

title: Are You Familiar with Imouto Moe?
overview: Haneda's day out features a slightly creepy conversation; Watarai gets physical when her boyfriend disappears into his dreamland!

title: We Don't Have...
overview: Haneda releases his fantasy world, and discovers the reason behind his very existence before reaching out to everyone who helped him.
